title: sageretia horridissima
intro: Sageretia horridissima, also known as the Rough Sageretia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is a shrub native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Sageretia horridissima can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the dried leaves and stems being used in herbal teas and tonics, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
